caption: A video call is displayed, featuring a screen-sharing session of a complex conceptual map against a black background. The map consists of various circular nodes connected by lines, with a red loop highlighting a specific section containing a small illustration of a person and the text "All Visible Assumptions". Nearby text includes "check page" and "first case". In the top right corner, a small video feed shows a man wearing headphones and a dark blue shirt. The browser tabs at the top of the window include titles such as "True Learning by Systemdynstii", "Future of Society by Systemdynstii", and "Road Community Food System". Throughout the sequence, the screen remains static, with no movement in the map or the man's expression, showing a paused or still moment during a digital presentation.
